name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Centered
description: Hero section with center-aligned content stack with balanced vertical rhythm.

name: Centered with image
description: Hero section with centered headline area with supporting hero image.

name: Background image
description: Hero section with hero content over a full-bleed background image.

name: Background image centered
description: Hero section with centered hero copy layered over a background image.
